final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing detailed exploded-view technical illustration of a Sony A7 camera showing all its components.

Style/medium: needs a technical exploded-diagram aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be exploded-view layout with all parts spread outward from the central body, clearly separated and labeled
Subject: must include the Sony A7 camera fully disassembled into all its individual components (body shell, sensor, shutter mechanism, lens mount, battery compartment, card slot, dials, buttons, viewfinder, display screen, grip, internal circuit boards, cables, screws, and all other parts)
Scene/backdrop: needs a clean, neutral backdrop — exact background treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a clear, technical-illustration atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a clean, high-contrast direction suited to technical diagrams — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include the name label for each individual part (in Spanish, matching the query language)
Constraints: must preserve all part labels visible and legible, connected to their respective components via lines or arrows; must include "Sony A7" branding on the camera body
Avoid:
